title: Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) in Product Design
content: The B.Des in Product Design specialization focuses on creating innovative, functional, and meaningful physical and digital products that enhance everyday life. It equips students with the ability to understand user needs, explore ideas, and develop well-crafted solutions through design thinking, technology, and hands-on making. Engrained in human-centered design, the program blends creativity with technical knowledge. Students gain expertise in form development, ergonomics, materials and manufacturing, product aesthetics, sustainability, and user experience, while also learning how to prototype and test ideas using physical and digital tools. The curriculum encourages critical inquiry, responsible innovation, and contextual awareness. From household products to consumer electronics and mobility solutions, students work on diverse challenges that prepare them for real-world applications. What Students Will Learn: Class 12th with minimum 50% marks For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Des Product Design Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or equivalent 2) 50% or above at XII level Industrial Designer / Product Designer / Consumer Electronics Designer / CMF (Color-Material-Finish) Specialist / UX-UI Designer for Physical-Digital Products / Design Researcher / Design Strategist / Sustainable Product Consultant / Rapid-Prototyping Specialist / CAD & Visualization Expert / Design Entrepreneur 01 Cultivate human-centred innovators who apply systems thinking to imagine physical-digital products that enrich everyday life. 02 Strengthen research-driven strategy so graduates can translate market, technology, and sustainability insights into compelling product opportunities. 03 Foster ethical, sustainable leadership that balances user delight, business viability, and planetary stewardship while respecting cultural contexts. 01 Design Knowledge: Apply design fundamentals, science and engineering concepts to solve complex product-design problems. 02 User & Problem Analysis: Identify user needs through structured research and convert findings into clear design requirements. 03 Design & Development: Create products and systems that balance function, aesthetics, ergonomics, safety and sustainability. 04 Investigation & Testing: Prototype, experiment and analyse data to validate assumptions and refine solutions. 05 Modern Tool Usage: Select and use contemporary digital and physical tools—including AI-aided CAD/CAM/CAE—for efficient design workflows. 06 Society & Culture: Evaluate social, cultural, legal and health impacts of design decisions and act responsibly. 07 Environment & Sustainability: Design with environmental stewardship, life-cycle thinking and circular-economy principles. 08 Ethics: Uphold professional, ethical and intellectual-property standards in all design activities. 09 Individual & Team Work: Function effectively as an individual, collaborative team member and leader in multidisciplinary settings. 10 Communication: Convey design concepts, decisions and outcomes clearly through visual, oral and written media. 11 Project Management & Entrepreneurship: Apply project-management, financial and entrepreneurial skills to deliver viable design ventures. 12 Lifelong Learning: Engage in continuous learning to keep pace with emerging technologies, methods and societal needs. 01 Achieve excellence in the development of innovative products that are inspired by sustainable and human-centered design principles. 02 Address real-world challenges through responsible design in order to make a meaningful contribution to society and industry. 03 Exhibit adaptability, effective collaboration, and ethical leadership in multidisciplinary environments. 04 Advance in the dynamic field of design by engaging in entrepreneurial ventures, higher education, or lifelong learning. 01 Apply human-centred and systems thinking to conceive innovative physical-digital products that improve everyday life. 02 Integrate materials, manufacturing processes and sustainability principles to realise feasible product solutions. Class 12th with minimum 50% marks For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Des Product Design Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or equivalent 2) 50% or above at XII level
